calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Request For Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAROLINA HERRERA's Motion For Request For Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770.

Plaintiff Carolina Herrera's unopposed Motion For Request For Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770 is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and a proper showing having been made under California Rules of Court, rule 3.770, the court orders Plaintiff may dismiss her individual claims with prejudice and the class claims without prejudice.

Moving Party to execute and file CV 110 form(s) to effectuate dismissal. Moving Party is advised to present this order to the clerk at the time of presenting the executed CV110 form(s).

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Request For Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770
Off Calendar Jul-07-2025 Continued To Jul-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
GEORGE R. NEMIROFF, Esq., of WYNNE LAW FIRM, Tel:(415) 461-6400 for plaintiff.
Jennifer Ayala, Esq., of GORDON REES SCULLY MANSUKHANI, LLP. Tel: (415) 875-3397 Defendants
FUTURE BARS,and FUTURE BEVERAGES, INC.

Hearing is held. Defendant/Plaintiff counsel contests the tentative ruling. Plaintiff has no objection to the Court's tentative. Plaintiff, however, would request the Court continue the hearing date and permit Plaintiff to submit supplemental briefing as opposed to filing a renewed motion. The matter argued/discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument,the Court vacate its tentative ruling.

This matter is continued to July 21, 2025; however, no hearing will be held on that date. Plaintiff's counsel is directed to submit and file supplemental documents pertaining to the settlement agreement by July 14, 2025, and to deliver a courtesy copy, along with a hard copy of the proposed order, by July 15, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
